name: Jack o Lantern Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread a small amount of peanut butter on the flat side of each cookie.
2. Place the top cookie pieces, with the peanut butter side facing inward, to complete the sandwiches.
3. Melt the almond bark according to package instructions.
4. Remove the melted almond bark from heat and add orange paste food coloring. Mix until desired color is achieved.
5. Using tongs, dip each sandwich cookie into the melted candy, ensuring it coats completely on both sides.
6. Gently shake off any excess candy.
7. Place the dipped cookies onto a wire rack lined with waxed paper.
8. Arrange licorice pieces to create faces on the cookies.
9. Allow the cookies to cool completely before removing them from the rack.
